title: Hornet Removal in Mott Haven, Bronx | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal in Mott Haven, Bronx. Safe, effective nest elimination for $350-$550. Serving homes and businesses near Yankee Stadium. Call today!
intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to residents and businesses throughout Mott Haven, especially during warmer months when nests grow rapidly. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, safe hornet removal services tailored to the unique needs of this historic Bronx neighborhood. Our licensed technicians eliminate hornet nests from residential buildings, commercial properties, and outdoor spaces with guaranteed results.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Mott Haven and the South Bronx, we understand the specific pest challenges facing this community's mix of pre-war walk-ups, row houses, and newer developments. Our team arrives quickly, works efficiently, and offers competitive pricing with transparent quotes—no hidden fees, just effective hornet removal you can trust.
localContext: Mott Haven's tree-lined streets near St. Mary's Park and the densely packed residential blocks around Alexander Avenue create ideal conditions for hornet nesting in eaves, porches, and building gaps. From the historic homes near the Bronx Museum to apartment buildings overlooking the Harlem River, we protect Mott Haven properties from aggressive hornet infestations year-round.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Mott Haven?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service throughout Mott Haven and the South Bronx. Emergency hornet removal is available for aggressive nests near entrances, playgrounds, or high-traffic areas. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal service?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough inspection, complete nest elimination using professional-grade treatments, physical nest removal when accessible, and a follow-up guarantee. Pricing varies based on nest size, location, and height accessibility. We provide free estimates before beginning work.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Mott Haven apartment buildings?
faqs.answer: Yes, hornets frequently build nests on fire escapes, under roof overhangs, in building vents, and around window air conditioning units common in Mott Haven's residential buildings. They're attracted to sheltered spaces with easy access to food sources in the neighborhood's parks and green spaces.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for families and pets in Mott Haven homes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted treatment methods that eliminate hornets while minimizing risk to residents, children, and pets. Our technicians are trained in safe application techniques, and we provide clear instructions for re-entry times. We take extra precautions in multi-family buildings to protect all residents.
